name: formatCurrencyCompact
description: Formats large currency values with K, M, B, T suffixes for compact display while maintaining currency context.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying large monetary values in dashboards.
Falls back to full currency format for smaller values.
Maintains 2 decimal places for abbreviated values.

return_value.description: Formatted currency string with suffix (e.g., '1.5M', '2.3B') or full format for small values.

Dont: Don't use for precise financial calculations
Don't forget to show full value on hover
